'''âr-n-g-y''' ('''karangeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exfill|exfill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exfill|exfill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-g-y
|-
! Lemma
| karangeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangeyoko|thirangeyoko]] || [[word:jirangeyoko|jirangeyoko]] || [[word:shirangeyoko|shirangeyoko]] || [[word:kirangeyoko|kirangeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurangeyoko|thuthurangeyoko]] || [[word:jujurangeyoko|jujurangeyoko]] || [[word:shushurangeyoko|shushurangeyoko]] || [[word:kukurangeyoko|kukurangeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurangeyoko|thurangeyoko]] || [[word:jurangeyoko|jurangeyoko]] || [[word:shurangeyoko|shurangeyoko]] || [[word:kurangeyoko|kurangeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therangeyoko|therangeyoko]] || [[word:jerangeyoko|jerangeyoko]] || [[word:sherangeyoko|sherangeyoko]] || [[word:kerangeyoko|kerangeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorangeyoko|thothorangeyoko]] || [[word:jojorangeyoko|jojorangeyoko]] || [[word:shoshorangeyoko|shoshorangeyoko]] || [[word:kokorangeyoko|kokorangeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorangeyoko|thorangeyoko]] || [[word:jorangeyoko|jorangeyoko]] || [[word:shorangeyoko|shorangeyoko]] || [[word:korangeyoko|korangeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorangeyoko|thorangeyoko]] || [[word:jorangeyoko|jorangeyoko]] || [[word:shorangeyoko|shorangeyoko]] || [[word:korangeyoko|korangeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrangeyoko|thĂŠrangeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrangeyoko|jĂŠrangeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrangeyoko|shĂŠrangeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrangeyoko|kĂŠrangeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharangeyoko|thatharangeyoko]] || [[word:jajarangeyoko|jajarangeyoko]] || [[word:shasharangeyoko|shasharangeyoko]] || [[word:kakarangeyoko|kakarangeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharangeyoko|tharangeyoko]] || [[word:jarangeyoko|jarangeyoko]] || [[word:sharangeyoko|sharangeyoko]] || [[word:karangeyoko|karangeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharangeyoko|tharangeyoko]] || [[word:jarangeyoko|jarangeyoko]] || [[word:sharangeyoko|sharangeyoko]] || [[word:karangeyoko|karangeyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
